texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Rate Agreement:
texts.text: Rate Agreement:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In accordance with and subject to the terms and conditions set forth, the following are our expectations of Company name in order to receive the Special Rate and Services from The Ritz-Carlton, Masai Mara Safari Camp. The Special Rate is confidential and cannot be promoted or sold on the internet or otherwise (including third party websites) unless 'packaged' with other elements. Company name must ensure that reasonable steps are taken to ensure its B2B Partner does not sell the room rates provided in a manner that discloses directly or indirectly the accommodation room rate.
texts.text: In accordance with and subject to the terms and conditions set forth, the following are our expectations of Company name in order to receive the Special Rate and Services from The Ritz-Carlton, Masai Mara Safari Camp. The Special Rate is confidential and cannot be promoted or sold on the internet or otherwise (including third party websites) unless 'packaged' with other elements. Company name must ensure that reasonable steps are taken to ensure its B2B Partner does not sell the room rates provided in a manner that discloses directly or indirectly the accommodation room rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: GROUP RATE:
texts.text: GROUP RATE:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Group rate for minimum of 10 paying rooms and above are negotiable on ad hoc basis, except during Easter or festive period.
texts.text: Group rate for minimum of 10 paying rooms and above are negotiable on ad hoc basis, except during Easter or festive period.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TOUR LEADER:
texts.text: TOUR LEADER:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Complimentary accommodation will be granted to bona fide tour leaders on half twin rate basis after a minimum of 10 paying rooms, a maximum of 2 complementary guests in a group - subject to confirmation and room availability.
texts.text: Complimentary accommodation will be granted to bona fide tour leaders on half twin rate basis after a minimum of 10 paying rooms, a maximum of 2 complementary guests in a group - subject to confirmation and room availability.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: FAM TRIPS:
texts.text: FAM TRIPS:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We welcome and value the necessity of familiarization (FAM) trip to our properties. Please inquire for agent rate, terms and conditions.
texts.text: We welcome and value the necessity of familiarization (FAM) trip to our properties. Please inquire for agent rate, terms and conditions.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please note that we do not accept FAM trips during the following months: June, July, August, September, December and the beginning of January.
texts.text: Please note that we do not accept FAM trips during the following months: June, July, August, September, December and the beginning of January.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: SINGLE ROOM POLICY:
texts.text: SINGLE ROOM POLICY:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Maximum of 3 single rooms per group at single room rate, any additional single room request will be charged at a double room rate.
texts.text: Maximum of 3 single rooms per group at single room rate, any additional single room request will be charged at a double room rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CHILDREN POLICY:
texts.text: CHILDREN POLICY:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The property is unfenced and for safety reasons, we don't recommend children below the age of 6 years.
texts.text: The property is unfenced and for safety reasons, we don't recommend children below the age of 6 years.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: BOOKING RESERVATIONS AND CONFIRMATION:
texts.text: BOOKING RESERVATIONS AND CONFIRMATION:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All reservations are subject to room availability unless a firm room allotment has been agreed upon as part of this agreement.
texts.text: All reservations are subject to room availability unless a firm room allotment has been agreed upon as part of this agreement.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A booking will only be confirmed upon receipt of a booking voucher from the tour operator (payment terms and conditions as per contract), and any further amendments should follow the same procedure. A booking confirmation voucher will be send to the agent upon receipt of full payments as per the invoice. Please ensure that clients have a copy of their confirmation voucher, as they are required to present this voucher on arrival at the camp.
texts.text: A booking will only be confirmed upon receipt of a booking voucher from the tour operator (payment terms and conditions as per contract), and any further amendments should follow the same procedure. A booking confirmation voucher will be send to the agent upon receipt of full payments as per the invoice. Please ensure that clients have a copy of their confirmation voucher, as they are required to present this voucher on arrival at the camp.

texts.text: PAYMENT TERMS

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: RELEASE PERIOD:
texts.text: RELEASE PERIOD:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All reservations, cancellations and/or amendments must be made in writing and receipt of cancellation must be acknowledged in writing by The Ritz-Carlton, Masai Mara Safari Camp.
texts.text: All reservations, cancellations and/or amendments must be made in writing and receipt of cancellation must be acknowledged in writing by The Ritz-Carlton, Masai Mara Safari Camp.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Ritz-Carlton, Masai Mara Safari Camp reserves the right to cancel or amend the Services without any liability where the Services cannot be supplied at all or cannot be supplied as described or agreed due to circumstances beyond its control or the control of the applicable third party suppliers.
texts.text: The Ritz-Carlton, Masai Mara Safari Camp reserves the right to cancel or amend the Services without any liability where the Services cannot be supplied at all or cannot be supplied as described or agreed due to circumstances beyond its control or the control of the applicable third party suppliers.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: BOOKING REQUIREMENTS:
texts.text: BOOKING REQUIREMENTS:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All bookings are subject to Camp standard booking requirements, available upon request, cancellation policies, check-in and check-out times.
texts.text: All bookings are subject to Camp standard booking requirements, available upon request, cancellation policies, check-in and check-out times.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PAYMENTS FROM GUESTS:
texts.text: PAYMENTS FROM GUESTS:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Camp will collect payment from its guests for any automatic and mandatory charges, and incidental charges not included in the Standard Room Charge (defined below).
texts.text: The Camp will collect payment from its guests for any automatic and mandatory charges, and incidental charges not included in the Standard Room Charge (defined below).

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CAMP INFORMATION:
texts.text: CAMP INFORMATION:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All information provided to you by the lodge must be reproduced without changes. You must provide the Hotel with copies of any distributed content at points of sale upon request. You shall make Marriott guest rooms available for booking using only the rate plans provided by the Camp under this Agreement. You shall not display other third party rate plans or other information for the Camp including wholesale and other third party affiliated rate plans and information. 'Your Channel(s)' means, except as disapproved by Marriott or lodge in its sole and absolute discretion from time to time, collectively, any mechanism (e.g., websites, xml feeds or call centers), in each case owned or operated by you or one of your affiliates, through which you market Dynamic Packages directly for booking by Camp guests. All terms and conditions of this Agreement applicable to you shall apply directly and in full to your Channels. 'Dynamic Package' means the combination of a room made available under this Agreement with one or more other travel-related components of material value such as air inventory, rental car inventory, or rail ticket, that is booked concurrently in the same session where the Rate is not apparent to the guest.
texts.text: All information provided to you by the lodge must be reproduced without changes. You must provide the Hotel with copies of any distributed content at points of sale upon request. You shall make Marriott guest rooms available for booking using only the rate plans provided by the Camp under this Agreement. You shall not display other third party rate plans or other information for the Camp including wholesale and other third party affiliated rate plans and information. 'Your Channel(s)' means, except as disapproved by Marriott or lodge in its sole and absolute discretion from time to time, collectively, any mechanism (e.g., websites, xml feeds or call centers), in each case owned or operated by you or one of your affiliates, through which you market Dynamic Packages directly for booking by Camp guests. All terms and conditions of this Agreement applicable to you shall apply directly and in full to your Channels. 'Dynamic Package' means the combination of a room made available under this Agreement with one or more other travel-related components of material value such as air inventory, rental car inventory, or rail ticket, that is booked concurrently in the same session where the Rate is not apparent to the guest.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: RATES VALID FOR OPAQUE PACKAGED TRAVEL ONLY:
texts.text: RATES VALID FOR OPAQUE PACKAGED TRAVEL ONLY:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All rates quoted herein are applicable to FIT leisure packaged travel only. The rates quoted in this Agreement are only for you to facilitate the booking by individual transient leisure travel guests of opaque packaged rates, not for business travel or group travel-oriented channels. You are not authorized to release these rates to any other individual or entity, including but not limited to, internet booking/electronic distribution systems, except to offline travel agencies or as and to the extent specifically authorized by Marriott or the Hotel from time to time and subject to its sole and absolute discretion to terminate with immediate effect any prior authorizations. You may not offer these rates as room-only / unbundled bookings in any manner (e.g. room tax and/or fees listed separately). Package components must be booked concurrently with the room booking, and the prices for each of the package components (hotel room, airfare and/or car rental) shall not be itemized for, disclosed to or discernible by the guest at any time (including but not limited to billing statements) and you must not provide functionality which would permit guests to strip the package down to view Hotel room rates separately at any time. Furthermore, you agree to indemnify lodge for any loss or damage arising from your breach of this Section.
texts.text: All rates quoted herein are applicable to FIT leisure packaged travel only. The rates quoted in this Agreement are only for you to facilitate the booking by individual transient leisure travel guests of opaque packaged rates, not for business travel or group travel-oriented channels. You are not authorized to release these rates to any other individual or entity, including but not limited to, internet booking/electronic distribution systems, except to offline travel agencies or as and to the extent specifically authorized by Marriott or the Hotel from time to time and subject to its sole and absolute discretion to terminate with immediate effect any prior authorizations. You may not offer these rates as room-only / unbundled bookings in any manner (e.g. room tax and/or fees listed separately). Package components must be booked concurrently with the room booking, and the prices for each of the package components (hotel room, airfare and/or car rental) shall not be itemized for, disclosed to or discernible by the guest at any time (including but not limited to billing statements) and you must not provide functionality which would permit guests to strip the package down to view Hotel room rates separately at any time. Furthermore, you agree to indemnify lodge for any loss or damage arising from your breach of this Section.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: REVENUE AND TAXES:
texts.text: REVENUE AND TAXES:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For guest rooms booked by guests through you or your Channels at rates provided through this Agreement, you will pay the Camp an amount equal to 100% of the rate plus any applicable taxes and other charges (the 'Standard Room Charge') not included in the rate above. As between you and the Lodge, you will retain all amounts by which the price of a Dynamic Package exceeds the Standard Room Charge (the 'Guest Price') You will be solely responsible for, and will timely remit to the proper taxing authorities, any and all taxes, duties, charges and governmental fees that are applicable to the difference between the Guest Price and the Standard Room Charge.
texts.text: For guest rooms booked by guests through you or your Channels at rates provided through this Agreement, you will pay the Camp an amount equal to 100% of the rate plus any applicable taxes and other charges (the 'Standard Room Charge') not included in the rate above. As between you and the Lodge, you will retain all amounts by which the price of a Dynamic Package exceeds the Standard Room Charge (the 'Guest Price') You will be solely responsible for, and will timely remit to the proper taxing authorities, any and all taxes, duties, charges and governmental fees that are applicable to the difference between the Guest Price and the Standard Room Charge.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: DISCLOSURE:
texts.text: DISCLOSURE:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You must, and must take commercially reasonable steps to ensure that your Channels: (a) advise all guests that they are responsible for payment of all charges over and above the Standard Room Charge (e.g., internet access); and (b) clearly and conspicuously disclose to guests in advance of booking all state and local taxes and all automatic or mandatory charges (e.g., resort charges) specified by the lodge, so as to ensure affirmative, knowing consent by the guest to such fees prior to purchase.
texts.text: You must, and must take commercially reasonable steps to ensure that your Channels: (a) advise all guests that they are responsible for payment of all charges over and above the Standard Room Charge (e.g., internet access); and (b) clearly and conspicuously disclose to guests in advance of booking all state and local taxes and all automatic or mandatory charges (e.g., resort charges) specified by the lodge, so as to ensure affirmative, knowing consent by the guest to such fees prior to purchase.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: COMPLIANCE WITH LAWS:
texts.text: COMPLIANCE WITH LAWS:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You will comply with all applicable foreign and domestic laws, codes, regulations, ordinances and rules with respect to your obligations under this Agreement and the services to be provided by you hereunder, including but not limited to any laws and regulations governing package and tour travel operators/organizers.
texts.text: You will comply with all applicable foreign and domestic laws, codes, regulations, ordinances and rules with respect to your obligations under this Agreement and the services to be provided by you hereunder, including but not limited to any laws and regulations governing package and tour travel operators/organizers.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PERSONAL DATA:
texts.text: PERSONAL DATA:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Each party acts as an independent controller with respect to its processing of personal data in connection with this Agreement. Each party will comply with its respective obligations under applicable data protection laws with respect to its processing of such personal data. To the extent that either party provides personal data to the other party pursuant to this agreement, the party supplying the personal data confirms that it has consent or another legal basis to provide the personal data to the receiving party and for the receiving party to process the personal data consistent with this Agreement, and in accordance with its applicable privacy policy. For clarity, nothing in this Agreement limits a party's ability to use an individual's personal data to the extent directed by, consented to or requested by such individual.
texts.text: Each party acts as an independent controller with respect to its processing of personal data in connection with this Agreement. texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: INSURANCE:
texts.text: INSURANCE:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You must procure, maintain and keep in full force and effect during the term of the agreement adequate insurance coverage (including public liability or commercial general liability insurance and property) as required by law, with a reputable company, including insurance coverage as required under applicable Marriott standards as Hotel may notify you from time to time.
texts.text: You must procure, maintain and keep in full force and effect during the term of the agreement adequate insurance coverage (including public liability or commercial general liability insurance and property) as required by law, with a reputable company, including insurance coverage as required under applicable Marriott standards as Hotel may notify you from time to time.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: DISPUTE RESOLUTION:
texts.text: DISPUTE RESOLUTION:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The parties agree that any dispute in any way arising out of or relating to this Agreement will be resolved by arbitration before JAMS/ENDISPUTE® or the American Arbitration Association in the state and city in which the Hotel is located or the closest available location; provided, however, a dispute relating to infringement of intellectual property rights shall not be subject to this provision. The parties further agree that in any arbitration proceeding they may conduct reasonable discovery pursuant to the arbitration rules, that the law of the state, province or country in which the Hotel is located is will be the governing law, and any arbitration award will be enforceable in that state's, province's or federal court.
texts.text: The parties agree that any dispute in any way arising out of or relating to this Agreement will be resolved by arbitration before JAMS/ENDISPUTE® or the American Arbitration Association in the state and city in which the Hotel is located or the closest available location; provided, however, a dispute relating to infringement of intellectual property rights shall not be subject to this provision. The parties further agree that in any arbitration proceeding they may conduct reasonable discovery pursuant to the arbitration rules, that the law of the state, province or country in which the Hotel is located is will be the governing law, and any arbitration award will be enforceable in that state's, province's or federal court.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: RELOCATED CUSTOMERS:
texts.text: RELOCATED CUSTOMERS:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Camp will follow its customary relocation policy in regard to Customers. It is standard practice when relocating a customer, to refer the customer to a comparable Marriott affiliated lodge in the area or a hotel of another brand in the area with comparable standards of hospitality.
texts.text: The Camp will follow its customary relocation policy in regard to Customers. It is standard practice when relocating a customer, to refer the customer to a comparable Marriott affiliated lodge in the area or a hotel of another brand in the area with comparable standards of hospitality.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TERMINATION:
texts.text: TERMINATION:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Either party may terminate this Agreement at any time upon 30 days' written notice to   the other party: 1. Hotel reserves the right to cancel any booking made in breach of the Agreement.
texts.text: Either party may terminate this Agreement at any time upon 30 days' written notice to   the other party: 1. Hotel reserves the right to cancel any booking made in breach of the Agreement.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Any breach by you of obligations under Your Obligations will be a material breach of the Agreement, resulting in an immediate suspension or termination of the Agreement, as solely determined by Hotel in its reasonable judgment. You shall inform Hotel of any violations of the Agreement of which you become aware.
texts.text: Any breach by you of obligations under Your Obligations will be a material breach of the Agreement, resulting in an immediate suspension or termination of the Agreement, as solely determined by Hotel in its reasonable judgment. You shall inform Hotel of any violations of the Agreement of which you become aware.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Upon termination of the Agreement, Hotel and you will continue to honour the terms of the Agreement with respect to any booking made prior to the termination date for dates following the termination date, unless termination occurred due to a monetary breach.
texts.text: Upon termination of the Agreement, Hotel and you will continue to honour the terms of the Agreement with respect to any booking made prior to the termination date for dates following the termination date, unless termination occurred due to a monetary breach.

table_cells.text: Luxurious accommodation and meals on Full Board basis with personalized butler service
Alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages including premium wines and spirits
Bush Meals Breakfast/lunch- Weather permitting
Champagne breakfast, sunrise smoothie and coffee glide
On property high-tea with assorted exotic teas and edible flowers
Sundowners - Weather permitting
Boma dining experience
Child minding (06:00 am - 10:00pm)
Chef's table experience at the wine cellar
Wine paring sessions with our in-house sommelier
Exclusive game drives in your private luxury open safari land cruiser, incl. of refreshments
A pair of binoculars in the vehicles to bring you closer to the wildlife
Use of photo studio, canon professional cameras and lenses
Rhino Sanctuary visits - entrance fees payable directly
Access to our wellness hub featuring our signature open air pool, gym and Spa
Visit to the cultural village
Wi-Fi throughout the Lodge
Return airstrip transfers to and from the Keekorok / Serena airstrip
Laundry services
All statutory taxes
